name: item_price_band_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts a current-price band directly from current price.
comment: Included as a direct thresholding classifier where the target band is defined entirely by i_current_price, making it a clean sanity-check classification task.
target_expression: CASE WHEN i_current_price < 20 THEN 0 WHEN i_current_price < 50 THEN 1 WHEN i_current_price < 100 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

name: item_manager_classifier
description: Proxy-label classifier that predicts the item manager from brand, class, and category identifiers.
comment: Kept as a lookup-style benchmark to measure how much of the product hierarchy signal is enough to recover manager assignment on held-out rows.
